description: The Santa (or Società maggiore) is a high-level criminal organization within the 'Ndrangheta, founded in the mid-1970s. Members, called santisti, can interact with non-members including police, politicians, and Freemasons. The group has its own rituals and hierarchy, with a maximum of 33 members originally, later expanded. It is considered one of the highest ranks in the Calabrian mafia.
